objective: Independently identify the shortest evidence-backed path from the current integrated Bridge to SKELETON_GREEN and a bounded offline conditional RC, with exact next-stage files, dependencies and acceptance commands.
executable_blocker: The implementation surface is broad and already integrated in many bounded stages, but the canonical reference receipt still reports global_skeleton_green=false and the public status is stale; Agent 0 needs an independent control-plane gap map before opening more implementation write-sets.
required_output: remaining mandatory SKELETON_GREEN and offline RC gaps ranked by criticality
exact proposed next bounded stages with agent owner and nonoverlapping write-set
license packaging deployment soak and production items clearly separated
explicit rejection of duplicate kernels ledgers or domain truth writers in Bridge
acceptance_commands: test exact HEAD and upstream equal 39bfa687be5b90a66671abe1ef8689b8a08142c4
cross-check every claimed capability against source test and IntegrationReceipt evidence
return read-only audit to Agent 0 with no repository diff
rollback: Delete the clean read-only audit branch/worktree. No repository or external state is mutated.
